Focus.name: Focus
Focus.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple laptop on a desk with a soft glow emanating from its screen, depicted as concentric rounded shapes. A tiny coffee cup and a single sticky note sit beside it. Cozy muted blues and warm off-white tones with simplified geometric shapes, clean outlines, and no realistic detail.

Time Management.name: Time Management
Time Management.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a smartphone displaying a simple grid calendar with rounded colored blocks, resting beside a tiny stack of papers on a clean desk. Soft teal and charcoal tones, simplified geometric shapes, clean linework, and a cozy aesthetic with no realistic detail.

Frugality.name: Frugality
Frugality.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a small piggy bank beside a simple noodle cup and a basic mug on a tidy desk. A tiny budget sheet with simplified lines hangs on the wall. Muted grey and soft green tones, rounded geometric shapes, clean outlines, and a cozy aesthetic.

Meditation.name: Meditation
Meditation.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simplified figure sitting cross-legged on a small rounded mat, with a glowing orb-shaped lamp nearby. Soft amber and indigo tones, rounded geometric shapes, clean linework, and a cozy, calming aesthetic with no realistic detail.

Typing Speed.name: Typing Speed
Typing Speed.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple keyboard with a few motion lines trailing off the keys, and a small monitor above showing a rising bar graph. Soft electric blue and white tones, rounded geometric shapes, clean outlines, and a cozy minimalist aesthetic.

Grammar & Prose.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of an open laptop showing simple lines of text with a few highlighted marks, beside a small book and a rounded coffee cup. Soft navy and ivory tones, simplified geometric shapes, clean linework, and a cozy aesthetic.
